---
title: "NYC"
format: docx
editor: visual
---

## Libraries

```{r}

#install.packages('tidyverse')
  library(tidyverse)
#install.packages('dplyr')
  library(dplyr)
#install.packages('gmodels')
  library(gmodels)
#install.packages('readxl')
  library(readxl)
#install.packages('lubridate')
  library(lubridate)
#install.packages('tableone')
  library(tableone)

```

## Dataset 

Mutating Date Column

```{r}

data2 <- read.csv("previous_years.csv")

data1 <- read.csv("edheat2025_live.csv")

data <- bind_rows(data2, data1)
#Combines data sets with similar rows and columns

data$Date <- as.Date(data$END_DATE)
#Turns end date column into date

data$END_DATE <- NULL

```
